title: Version Control: Working with Git
description: A short demo on version control using Git. Some practical tips, best practices...
speaker: Özgün Balaban

title: Building Better Research Software Together
description:
Do you write code as part of your research, analyses, or daily work, but feel unsure about the "right way" to structure things?
You're not alone!
In this Coding Café session, we will explore simple and practical habits that make programming easier, more organized, and more enjoyable.
speaker: Özgün Balaban
